response: the sacred hymn siriragau mahala 3 speaks of the spirit of devotion and the power of the word - the true path is found through the grace of the guru - without the guru's guidance the path of devotion cannot be walked - the soul must merge with its true self - and become pure - the divine word is the true guide - it brings the soul to the divine - gene and language are part of the human experience - but the spirit is the key to understanding the divine - the visit to the guru is essential - for the soul's salvation - the true language of the spirit is the divine word - it is the light that leads the way - the soul must seek the guru - and find the path to the divine - the guru is the light - the guide - the friend - the one who shows the way - the soul must be humble - and open to the divine - the true visit is not to a place but to the divine - the language of the soul is the divine word - it is the key to the spirit's awakening - the gene of the soul is the divine - it is the source of all creation - the spirit must be awakened - through the grace of the guru - and the divine word - the visit to the guru is the beginning of the journey - the language of the heart is the divine word - it is the path to the spirit - the soul must seek the divine - through the guru's grace - and the divine word - the spirit is the true guide - and the divine word is the key to the soul's salvation - the gene of the soul is the divine - the language of the spirit is the divine word - the visit to the guru is the path to the divine - the spirit is the true guide - the divine word is the key to the soul's salvation - the soul must seek the guru - and the divine word - the path to the spirit is through the guru's grace - the visit is the beginning of the journey - the language of the soul is the divine word - the gene of the soul is the divine - the spirit is the true guide - the divine word is the key to the soul's salvation - the journey to the spirit is through the guru's grace - the visit is the beginning of the journey - the language of the heart is the divine word -
